sentences.target: On respecte le délai pour ce dossier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁɛspɛkt lə delɛ puʁ sə dɔsje/

translations.fr: On respecte le délai pour ce dossier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁɛspɛkt lə delɛ puʁ sə dɔsje/
translations.en: We’re meeting the deadline for this file.
translations.es: Cumplimos el plazo de este expediente.
translations.de: Wir halten die Frist für diese Akte ein.
translations.it: Rispettiamo la scadenza per questa pratica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们能赶上这个案子的截止日期。
translations.yue: 我哋會守住呢份文件嘅限期。
translations.ru: Мы соблюдаем срок по этому делу.
translations.he: אנחנו עומדים במועד האחרון לתיק הזה.
translations.tr: Bu dosya için teslim tarihine yetişiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đáp ứng đúng thời hạn cho hồ sơ này.
translations.nl: We halen de deadline voor dit dossier.
translations.uk: Ми вкладаємося в дедлайн щодо цієї справи.
translations.hu: Tartjuk a határidőt ennél az ügynél.
translations.hi: हम इस फाइल की समय सीमा पूरी कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τηρούμε την προθεσμία για αυτόν τον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Vi holder fristen for denne saken.
translations.id: Kami memenuhi tenggat waktu untuk berkas ini.
translations.sv: Vi håller tidsfristen för det här ärendet.
translations.da: Vi overholder fristen for denne sag.
translations.ja: この案件の締め切りを守っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun used for generic 'we/one'; 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd sg) agreeing with 'On'; means to comply with/observe.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'délai'.
Masculine noun meaning time limit/deadline; direct object of 'respecte'.
Preposition introducing a PP indicating scope/beneficiary ('for this file').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'dossier'.
Common noun meaning file/case; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je demande un délai pour payer.

translations.fr: Je demande un délai pour payer.
translations.en: I’m asking for an extension to pay.
translations.es: Estoy pidiendo una prórroga para pagar.
translations.pt: Estou pedindo uma prorrogação para pagar.
translations.vi: Tôi xin gia hạn để thanh toán.
translations.nl: Ik vraag om uitstel van betaling.
translations.hi: मैं भुगतान के लिए अतिरिक्त समय माँग रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya meminta perpanjangan waktu untuk membayar.
translations.sv: Jag ber om anstånd med betalning.
translations.ro: Cer o prelungire pentru a plăti.
translations.da: Jeg beder om udsættelse af betalningen.
translations.ja: 支払いの猶予をお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (1st sg) agreeing with 'Je'; means to request/ask for.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'délai'.
Masculine noun; direct object of 'demande'.
Preposition marking purpose ('to pay'), introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pour', expressing purpose.

sentences.target: Ils prolongent le délai jusqu’à vendredi.

translations.fr: Ils prolongent le délai jusqu’à vendredi.
translations.en: They’re extending the deadline until Friday.
translations.es: Amplían el plazo hasta el viernes.
translations.de: Sie verlängern die Frist bis Freitag.
translations.it: Prorogano la scadenza fino a venerdì.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把截止日期延长到星期五。
translations.yue: 佢哋將限期延長到星期五。
translations.he: הם מאריכים את המועד האחרון עד יום שישי.
translations.vi: Họ gia hạn thời hạn đến thứ Sáu.
translations.ar: يمدّدون الموعد النهائي حتى يوم الجمعة.
translations.nl: Ze verlengen de deadline tot vrijdag.
translations.hi: वे समय सीमा को शुक्रवार तक बढ़ा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Παρατείνουν την προθεσμία μέχρι την Παρασκευή.
translations.id: Mereka memperpanjang tenggat waktu sampai Jumat.
translations.ja: 締め切りを金曜日まで延長します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine/mixed).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd pl) agreeing with 'Ils'; means to extend/prolong.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'délai'.
Masculine noun; direct object of 'prolongent'.
Compound preposition ('jusque' + 'à' with elision) marking an endpoint in time.
Common noun naming a day; object of the preposition 'jusqu’à' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Le délai est court pour la réponse.
sentences.reading: /lə delɛ ɛ kuʁ puʁ la ʁepɔ̃s/

translations.fr: Le délai est court pour la réponse.
translations.ipa: /lə delɛ ɛ kuʁ puʁ la ʁepɔ̃s/
translations.en: The deadline is tight for the response.
translations.es: El plazo para responder es corto.
translations.de: Die Frist für die Antwort ist knapp.
translations.it: La scadenza per la risposta è breve.
translations.pt: O prazo para a resposta é apertado.
translations.vi: Thời hạn để trả lời rất gấp.
translations.nl: De deadline voor de reactie is krap.
translations.hi: जवाब की समय सीमा बहुत कम है.
translations.el: Η προθεσμία για την απάντηση είναι μικρή.
translations.id: Batas waktu untuk jawaban sangat singkat.
translations.ja: 返信の締め切りは厳しいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Masculine noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective; present indicative (3rd sg).
Predicate adjective, masculine singular, describing the subject 'délai'.
Preposition introducing a PP specifying scope/context ('for the response').
Definite article, feminine singular, modifying 'réponse'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.
